Spring Data Redis

  3. RedisCacheWriterConfigurer

Uses of Interface
org.springframework.data.redis.cache.RedisCacheWriter.RedisCacheWriterConfigurer

Packages that use RedisCacheWriter.RedisCacheWriterConfigurer
Package
Description
org.springframework.data.redis.cache
Package providing a Redis implementation for Spring cache abstraction.

  • Uses of RedisCacheWriter.RedisCacheWriterConfigurer in org.springframework.data.redis.cache

    Methods in org.springframework.data.redis.cache that return RedisCacheWriter.RedisCacheWriterConfigurer
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    RedisCacheWriter.RedisCacheWriterConfigurer
    RedisCacheWriter.RedisCacheWriterConfigurer.batchStrategy(BatchStrategy batchStrategy)
    Configure the BatchStrategy when clearing the cache (i.e. bulk removal of cache keys).
    RedisCacheWriter.RedisCacheWriterConfigurer
    RedisCacheWriter.RedisCacheWriterConfigurer.cacheLocking(Consumer<RedisCacheWriter.CacheLockingConfigurer> configurerConsumer)
    Configure cache locking to synchronize cache access across multiple cache instances.
    default RedisCacheWriter.RedisCacheWriterConfigurer
    RedisCacheWriter.RedisCacheWriterConfigurer.collectStatistics()
    Configure the CacheStatisticsCollector to use.
    RedisCacheWriter.RedisCacheWriterConfigurer
    RedisCacheWriter.RedisCacheWriterConfigurer.collectStatistics(CacheStatisticsCollector cacheStatisticsCollector)
    Configure the CacheStatisticsCollector to use.
    default RedisCacheWriter.RedisCacheWriterConfigurer
    RedisCacheWriter.RedisCacheWriterConfigurer.enableLocking()
    Enable cache locking to synchronize cache access across multiple cache instances.
    default RedisCacheWriter.RedisCacheWriterConfigurer
    RedisCacheWriter.RedisCacheWriterConfigurer.enableLocking(Consumer<RedisCacheWriter.CacheLockingConfiguration> configurerConsumer)
    Enable cache locking to synchronize cache access across multiple cache instances.
    default RedisCacheWriter.RedisCacheWriterConfigurer
    RedisCacheWriter.RedisCacheWriterConfigurer.immediateWrites()
    Use immediate writes (i.e. write operations such as RedisCacheWriter.put(String, byte[], byte[], Duration) or RedisCacheWriter.clear(String, byte[])) shall apply immediately.
    RedisCacheWriter.RedisCacheWriterConfigurer
    RedisCacheWriter.RedisCacheWriterConfigurer.immediateWrites(boolean enableImmediateWrites)
    Configure whether to use immediate writes (i.e. write operations such as RedisCacheWriter.put(String, byte[], byte[], Duration) or RedisCacheWriter.clear(String, byte[])) shall apply immediately.
    Method parameters in org.springframework.data.redis.cache with type arguments of type RedisCacheWriter.RedisCacheWriterConfigurer
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static RedisCacheWriter
    RedisCacheWriter.create(RedisConnectionFactory connectionFactory, Consumer<RedisCacheWriter.RedisCacheWriterConfigurer> configurerConsumer)
    Create new RedisCacheWriter configure it through RedisCacheWriter.RedisCacheWriterConfigurer.
